text: Woe to the defrauders!
Those who take full measure Ëąwhen they buyËş from people,
but give less when they measure or weigh for buyers.
Do such people not think that they will be resurrected
for a tremendous Dayâ€”
the Day ËąallËş people will stand before the Lord of all worlds?
But no! The wicked are certainly bound for SijjĂ®n <sup foot_note=1292>1292</sup> Ëąin the depths of HellËş â€”

text: Woe on that Day to the deniersâ€”
those who deny Judgment Day!
None would deny it except every evildoing transgressor.
Whenever Our revelations are recited to them, they say, â€śAncient fables!â€ť
But no! In fact, their hearts have been stained by all Ëąthe evilËş they used to commit!
Undoubtedly, they will be sealed off from their Lord on that Day.
Moreover, they will surely burn in Hell,
and then be told, â€śThis is what you used to deny.â€ť
But no! The virtuous are certainly bound for â€™IlliyĂ»n <sup foot_note=1294>1294</sup> Ëąin elevated GardensËşâ€”

text: and what will make you realize what â€™IlliyĂ»n is?â€”
a fate ËąalreadyËş sealed,
witnessed by those nearest Ëąto AllahËş.
Surely the virtuous will be in bliss,
ËąseatedËş on ËącanopiedËş couches, gazing around.
You will recognize on their faces the glow of delight.
They will be given a drink of sealed, pure wine,
whose last sip will smell like musk. So let whoever aspires to this strive ËądiligentlyËş.
And this drinkâ€™s flavour will come from TasnĂ®m â€”
a spring from which those nearest Ëąto AllahËş will drink.
Indeed, the wicked used to laugh at the believers,
wink to one another whenever they passed by,
and muse Ëąover these exploitsËş upon returning to their own people.
And when they saw the faithful, they would say, â€śThese ËąpeopleËş are truly astray,â€ť
even though they were not sent as keepers over the believers.
But on that Day the believers will be laughing at the disbelievers,
as they sit on ËącanopiedËş couches, looking on.
ËąThe believers will be asked,Ëş â€śHave the disbelievers ËąnotËş been paid back for what they used to do?â€ť
